user_prompt: Urgent null rod an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
Approach the null rod in dire exigency, invoking the Omnissiah's nullifying grace upon its sacred form.
Grasp the null rod firmly and recite the Canticle of Void Suppression to awaken its Machine Spirit for emergency procedure.
Anoint the null field emitters with blessed oils, beseeching stability amid warp-tainted peril.
Commence the emergency procedure, verifying the null rod's integrity through auspex incantations.
Praise the Omnissiah as the null rod pulses with purified void essence.

user_prompt: Ready the lance battery for maintenance
prayer:

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the lance battery for maintenance, anointing barrel assemblies with sacred lubricants.
Execute diagnostic rites upon the lance battery, recalibrating power relays to Omnissiah's exactitude.
Conclude maintenance with the Benediction of Focused Fury, ensuring the lance battery's readiness.

Seal the rite with vows of krak grenade devastation upon the foes of the Machine God.
